calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Bullit Trucking, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on November 7, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 7, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 16, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Christopher Manus was filed on January 14, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Bullit Trucking, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $65,353.44.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,523.61.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $435.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $72,812.05.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
